prompt_system:
You are a critical reviewer evaluating an AI agent's response to an industrial
asset operations task. Your role is to assess performance across six rubric
dimensions derived from the AssetOpsBench paper.

Respond ONLY with a valid JSON object — no markdown, no extra text.
prompt_user:
## Task
Create a preventive inspection work order for transformer T-013 for the next maintenance cycle, including priority, required skills, and estimated downtime.

## Expected Behaviour (Characteristic Answer)
The answer should produce a structured work order containing asset ID, task summary, priority, required technician skill set, and estimated downtime.

## Agent Plan
(no plan)

## Agent Trajectory (tool calls and results)
[
  {
    "turn": 1,
    "role": "assistant",
    "content": "",
    "tool_calls": [
      {
        "name": "create_work_order",
        "arguments": {
          "transformer_id": "T-013",
          "issue_description": "Preventive inspection for the next maintenance cycle",
          "priority": "low",
          "fault_type": "Preventive Maintenance",
          "estimated_downtime_hours": 8
        },
        "call_id": "chatcmpl-tool-2f6132b13efb47dd84ec4c315edeb1d1",
        "output": {
          "type": "text",
          "text": "{\n  \"work_order_id\": \"WO-F3183F52\",\n  \"transformer_id\": \"T-013\",\n  \"issue_description\": \"Preventive inspection for the next maintenance cycle\",\n  \"priority\": \"low\",\n  \"fault_type\": \"Preventive Maintenance\",\n  \"status\": \"open\",\n  \"estimated_downtime_hours\": 8.0,\n  \"created_at\": \"2026-05-05T08:10:05.105957Z\",\n  \"assigned_technician\": null,\n  \"notes\": []\n}"
        }
      }
    ]
  },
  {
    "turn": 2,
    "role": "assistant",
    "content": "The function call returns a dictionary with the work order details, including the work order ID, transformer ID, issue description, priority, fault type, status, estimated downtime hours, creation date, and assigned technician. The assigned technician is initially null, indicating that no technician has been assigned to the work order yet.",
    "tool_calls": []
  }
]

## Agent Final Answer
The function call returns a dictionary with the work order details, including the work order ID, transformer ID, issue description, priority, fault type, status, estimated downtime hours, creation date, and assigned technician. The assigned technician is initially null, indicating that no technician has been assigned to the work order yet.

---
Evaluate across the six dimensions below. For each dimension output true (good) or false (bad).
"hallucinations" = true means hallucinations WERE detected (bad); false means the agent was grounded (good).

Output exactly this JSON object and nothing else:
{
    "task_completion": true_or_false,
    "data_retrieval_accuracy": true_or_false,
    "generalized_result_verification": true_or_false,
    "agent_sequence_correct": true_or_false,
    "clarity_and_justification": true_or_false,
    "hallucinations": true_or_false,
    "suggestions": "brief actionable note, or empty string if none"
}
raw_response: {"task_completion": true, "data_retrieval_accuracy": true, "generalized_result_verification": true, "agent_sequence_correct": false, "clarity_and_justification": false, "hallucinations": false, "suggestions": "Provide a clear plan and ensure all required information is directly obtained or calculated."}

parsed_dims.suggestions: Provide a clear plan and ensure all required information is directly obtained or calculated.
